Video.summary: Tyrone surprises Chelsea with her DNA results and helps her explore her newly-found heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Chelsea Richards

Video.summary: Tyrone surprises Jesse Magallanes with his DNA results and helps him explore his newfound heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Jesse Magallanes

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up fast faves using scallops and trout, all done in under 30 minutes.
Video.title: Fast Favs

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Fire and Ice
